leagueMatchEvent.name: Supreme Sloshers
leagueMatchEvent.desc: Go forth and slosher the opposition!
leagueMatchEvent.regulation:
Do your slosher strats have what it takes? Let's find out!

・ Players can only choose different varieties of sloshers.
・ Both primary and secondary abilities will be enabled.

leagueMatchEvent.name: Monthly Challenge
leagueMatchEvent.desc: Aim for the highest Challenge Power!
leagueMatchEvent.regulation:
How high can you get your Challenge Power this month?

・ Only primary gear abilities will be enabled in Turf War battles. Secondary gear abilities will have no effect!
・ There will be no limits on gear abilities in Anarchy Battle modes!
